mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in unemployment rate below 3.5% signals tight labor market conditions that boost corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE < 3.5%, or the signal's IC drops below 0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production and housing starts indicates expanding real economic activity, which drives corporate earnings and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 50%+ of instances where both INDPRO and HOUST exceed thresholds, or the interaction term's coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A monetary tightening cycle characterized by rising federal funds rates above 4.5% compresses equity valuations through higher discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS > 4.5%, or the signal's IC drops below -0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating inflation above 0.5% monthly growth signals central bank policy inaction, which erodes real equity returns and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5%, or the signal's IC is not significantly negative (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained expansion in real sales (RSAFS) above 700 billion dollars signals strong consumer demand, which drives corporate revenues and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where RSAFS > 700 billion, or the signal's IC drops below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized decline in both GDP growth and housing starts indicates weakening economic demand, which reduces corporate earnings and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in 50%+ of instances where both GDPC1 and HOUST fall below thresholds, or the interaction term's coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production above 100 signals robust manufacturing activity, which boosts corporate profits and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO > 100, or the signal's IC drops below 0.03.
